source_jobs.title: Field Service Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Ampd Energy

Ampd Energy is transforming how cities build - cleaner, smarter, and more sustainably. We are trailblazers in making the construction industry emission-free. Our products are advanced, compact, and connected battery energy storage system (BESS) designed to replace the dirty, noisy, and hazardous diesel generators that power construction sites around the world. By combining connected hardware with advanced software and AI, we reduce emissions, noise, and operational complexity.

We envision an emission-free future across all industries. Our mission is to develop robust, versatile, and easy-to-use products that deliver clean energy - empowering businesses and people to achieve more. We're seeking individuals who bring entrepreneurial drive, adaptability, and enthusiasm, and who thrive in an environment of continuous learning and evolution.

source_jobs.title: Hardware Test Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Ampd Energy

Ampd Energy is transforming how cities build - cleaner, smarter, and more sustainably. We are trailblazers in making the construction industry emission-free. Our products are advanced, compact, and connected battery energy storage system (BESS) designed to replace the dirty, noisy, and hazardous diesel generators that power construction sites around the world. By combining connected hardware with advanced software and AI, we reduce emissions, noise, and operational complexity.

We envision an emission-free future across all industries. Our mission is to develop robust, versatile, and easy-to-use products that deliver clean energy - empowering businesses and people to achieve more. We're seeking individuals who bring entrepreneurial drive, adaptability, and enthusiasm, and who thrive in an environment of continuous learning and evolution.


Role Overview:
The Test Engineer will own and support testing across our design and manufacturing process. This role is responsible for developing, implementing, and maintaining test plans, procedures, and systems that ensure product quality and reliability at scale.
You will work closely with R&D and Quality to translate product requirements into effective design and manufacturing tests, troubleshoot issues, and drive continuous improvement in testing and production performance.

source_jobs.title: Sales Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
About Ampd Energy

Ampd Energy is transforming how cities build - cleaner, smarter, and more sustainably. We are trailblazers in making the construction industry emission-free. Our products are advanced, compact, and connected battery energy storage system (BESS) designed to replace the dirty, noisy, and hazardous diesel generators that power construction sites around the world. By combining connected hardware with advanced software and AI, we reduce emissions, noise, and operational complexity.

We envision an emission-free future across all industries. Our mission is to develop robust, versatile, and easy-to-use products that deliver clean energy - empowering businesses and people to achieve more. We're seeking individuals who bring entrepreneurial drive, adaptability, and enthusiasm, and who thrive in an environment of continuous learning and evolution.


 
Role Overview:

The Sales Operations Specialist owns the end-to-end order lifecycle, supporting our Asia Pacific Sales team with the day to day sales operational task. This role serves as the operational backbone of the sales process, bridging between Sales, Supply Chain, Operations, Product Management, Engineering, Finance, and Service.
The role ensuring accurate order execution, on-time delivery, and smooth coordination across Sales, Supply Chain, Logistics, and Finance. 
The Sales Operations Specialist acts as the single point of ownership and visibility for the customer journey - once an opportunity enters the forecast, ensuring alignment between customer commitments, production capacity, delivery schedules, commissioning readiness, and revenue realization.

Role Overview:

The Sales Operations Specialist owns the end-to-end order lifecycle, supporting our Asia Pacific Sales team with the day to day sales admin and operational task. You will play a critical role in delivering a reliable customer experience while maintaining internal efficiency and control.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Role Overview: 
Ampd Energy is seeking an experienced Product Manager to lead the lifecycle management of our core product lines. You will own and operate the product management system at Ampd, sitting at the center of Product, Engineering, Service, Supply Chain, and Commercial to ensure our lifecycle runs smoothly, decisions are aligned, and initiatives move from concept to launch with clarity and discipline.
This is not a traditional “product visionary” role - at least not to start. It is a high-impact operator role focused on process, alignment, and execution. As the foundation is built and operating effectively, the role will naturally begin to support broader product strategy and vision.

notes: Ampd Energy is a clean energy startup with a strong focus on engineering and product development.
